title: Boss Mobile / Papa Life — Cloud ↔ Server webhook contract
description: Back-and-forth JSON between bossmobilelifecoach.com and Brian's cloud (Make.com Scenario 5259335, Claude, or MCP).

outbound.description: Server → cloud when a new contact is saved (GHL webhook, Make Scenario 1 follow-up, or site intake).

body.prompt: Required. Natural-language task for the cloud (includes contact summary).
body.outreach_note: string — 3-sentence Papa Life note for GHL
body.voice_prompt: string — short script for Brian's Claude voice mode

example.prompt: New Papa Life lead: Marcus Reed, marcus@example.com, 410-555-0199, source Facebook. Draft a warm follow-up text in Brian's voice and suggest one next step.
example.voice_prompt: Marcus Reed just came in from Facebook...

inbound.description: Cloud → server. POST JSON; Claude answers in Brian's Papa Life voice in the HTTP response body.

body.prompt: required string — what Claude should process
body.context: optional string — CRM/GHL context prepended to prompt

response.response: Claude text in Papa Life voice

endpoints.body: GHL contact fields or { contact: { ... } }; optional outreach_note if Claude already ran in Make

request.prompt: Summarize this lead and suggest the next outreach step in Brian's voice.

response.prompt: Summarize this lead and suggest the next outreach step in Brian's voice.
response.response: Here's what I'd do next, brother...
